name: TRIAL-BRAIN-000-baseline
hypothesis: GKX big-three via shallow GBM ranker on microcap-tilted EODHD 2017+ panel survives 25bps costs
expected_effect: 0-60 bps/mo excess vs universe EW; Sharpe 0.3-0.8 if real
kill_condition: Arm A |t|>=3 = pipeline leak (void all); Arm B t<1 = reject; survivorship gap > half edge = reject

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-001-baseline-clean
hypothesis: Same as BRAIN-000 on the corrected universe definition: major-exchange common stock, impossible returns nulled
expected_effect: 0-60 bps/mo excess; net Sharpe 0.3-0.8 if real
kill_condition: Arm A |t|>=3 = leak (void); Arm B t<1 = reject; coverage gap > half edge = reject

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-002-crsp-holdband
hypothesis: GKX big-three + 30% hold band on survivorship-free CRSP 2002-2024 survives 25bps net
expected_effect: +10-50 bps/mo net excess; Sharpe 0.4-0.9 if real
kill_condition: noise GROSS |t|>=3 = leak void; Arm B net t<1 = reject; post-2015 t<0.5 = decayed, no promotion

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-003-opportunistic-insider
hypothesis: Opportunistic (non-routine) insider open-market purchases (code P), traded at filing date, microcap-tilted, hold-banded, survive 25bps net on CRSP 2004-2024
expected_effect: Arm B +20-70 bps/mo net excess, Sharpe 0.3-0.8; Arm A routine ~0 (placebo)
kill_condition: noise gross |t|>=3 = leak void; routine t>=2 & within 0.5t of opp = confound; opp net t<1 = reject; opp post-2015 t<0.5 = decayed

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-004-pead-sue
hypothesis: PEAD/SUE (analyst + time-series) top quintile, enter day after rdq, 3mo hold, cap-segment, survives 25bps net on CRSP 2006-2024
expected_effect: Arm B marginal; micro>large; Arm B-A spread the direct PEAD test
kill_condition: noise gross|t|>=3 void; B net t<1 both segs reject; B-A spread t<1 no drift

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-005-revisions
hypothesis: Analyst revision momentum (IBES statpers) top quintile, hold-band, cap-segment, incremental over SUE, survives 25bps net
kill_condition: noise gross|t|>=3 void; B net t<1 both segs reject; not incremental to SUE flagged redundant
